distribution_scheme.author: Reviewing Attorney
distribution_scheme.basis: unmarried testator; entire estate to descendants by representation; minor children require a guardian nomination and a self-proving affidavit

children_recital: I am the parent of two minor children, John M. Moe and Chris F. Loe
specific_bequests: I give and bequeath my coin collection to my brother, Morgan J. Coe, if he survives me.
personal_representative_name: Morgan J. Coe, of Eliot, Maine
guardian_name: Sam T. Doe, of Eliot, Maine
successor_guardian_name: Quinn E. Loe, of Kittery, Maine
